title: listia subulata
intro: Listia subulata, also known as the Australian broom or broom bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Listia subulata include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Australian medicine.
